fireAgency: Los Angeles County Fire Department (LACoFD) — Battalion 16
electricUtility: Azusa Light & Water (municipal) / Southern California Edison (SCE)
buildingDeptNote: Azusa operates its own building division. Permit portal is a city-hosted legacy ASP system. Fire plan check coordinated through LACoFD Battalion 16 (contract since 1983).
